Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: telephones [300249768], telecommunication systems components [300052758], system components [300242031], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Portable, cordless telephones for use in a cellular radio network.
Draagbare, snoerloze telefoons voor gebruik binnen een mobiel netwerk.
在蜂巢式無線電網絡裡使用的可攜式無線電話。
Tragbares, schnurloses Telefon zur Nutzung in einem Mobilfunknetz.

Source.Source_ID: 2000047211/Gillespie and Robins, Communications Technologies, Journal of Communication (1989)
